sections.biography-source-undefined: Lai Min, styled Jingda, was from Xinye county, Yiyang commandery. He was a descendant of Lai Xi and the son of Lai Yan. He was also a descendant of Emperor Ming of Han and Prince Liu Qing (Emperor An’s father).

full_text:
Lai Min (Jingda) 來敏 (敬達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lai Min (來敏), styledJingda (敬達), was born in Xinye county, Yiyang commandery. Tested Fei Yi over a game of Weiqi. Known for his rude and envious behavior. Lai Min was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Lai Min lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.

BiographySource Undefined
Lai Min, styled Jingda, was from Xinye county, Yiyang commandery. He was a descendant of Lai Xi and the son of Lai Yan. He was also a descendant of Emperor Ming of Han and Prince Liu Qing (Emperor An’s father).
